title: BEM-840 external Claude escalation
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/escalations']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
b839=load('governance/state/bem839_verify_after_response_retry_tick.json')
real=[]; blockers=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            bad='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low
            ok=('DECISION:' in up and ('APPROVED' in up or 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up or 'BLOCKED' in up) and ('CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up or 'Claude Internal Auditor' in txt))
            if bad: blockers.append(str(p))
            elif ok: real.append(str(p))
if real:
    status='real_claude_response_exists_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response into agreed protocol'
else:
    status='no_real_claude_response_escalated_to_external_claude'
    next_action='external Claude must produce protocol or diagnose why internal Claude mailbox cannot respond'
    esc=Path('governance/escalations/bem840_external_claude_required.md')
    esc.write_text('# BEM-840 | External Claude Required'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Reason: internal Claude mailbox/runtime did not produce a real Claude response after infrastructure repair attempts.'+sep+sep+'Task for external Claude: analyze repository state and produce an agreed protocol for multi-agent system development with GPT external auditor. Also diagnose why internal Claude mailbox did not return a response. Required output: governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_external_claude_protocol_response.md with Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED. No issue comments.'+sep)
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem840_external_claude_escalation_request.md')
    mail.write_text('# BEM-840 | ESCALATION REQUEST TO CLAUDE'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Internal Claude mailbox did not produce a real response. External Claude is requested to prepare the agreed protocol and diagnose the mailbox/runtime blocker.'+sep+sep+'Required output: governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_external_claude_protocol_response.md'+sep+sep+'Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'bem839_status':b839.get('status'),'bem839_missing':b839.get('missing'),'real_responses':real[-10:],'blocker_files':blockers[-10:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_escalate_to_external_claude_if_no_real_response.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_escalate_to_external_claude_if_no_real_response.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Escalate To External Claude If No Real Response | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem840_escalate_to_external_claude_if_no_real_response.json','governance/reports/bem840_escalate_to_external_claude_if_no_real_response.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if not real:
    changed.extend(['governance/escalations/bem840_external_claude_required.md','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem840_external_claude_escalation_request.md'])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Escalated to external Claude task artifact if no real Claude response exists; kept PASS blocked until agreed protocol exists')
"""
No issue comments.
